title: Generic functions should be defined using the type parameter syntax
description: Functions should be defined using the type parameter syntax for better type hints and autocompletion.
message: Function does not use type parameter syntax.
recommendation: Refactor function to use type parameter syntax.

compliant.code: def func(arg1: int, arg2: str) -> None: pass

why_is_this_an_issue: Using type parameter syntax improves code readability and autocompletion.
how_to_fix: Refactor function to use type parameter syntax.

metadata.title: Generic functions should be defined using the type parameter syntax
